sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decrypt (dt DateTime, user_id UInt32, encrypted String, iv String) ENGINE = Memory;

INSERT INTO test_decrypt VALUES ('2023-01-01 00:00:00', 1, encrypt('aes-256-gcm', 'test1', 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey04', 'iv4'), 'iv4'), ('2023-01-01 00:00:01', 2, encrypt('aes-256-gcm', 'test2', 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey05', 'iv5'), 'iv5'), ('2023-01-01 00:00:02', 3, encrypt('aes-256-gcm', 'test3', 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey06', 'iv6'), 'iv6');
SELECT user_id, tryDecrypt('aes-256-gcm', encrypted, 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey04', iv) AS decrypted_value FROM test_decrypt;
UPDATE test_decrypt SET encrypted = encrypt('aes-256-gcm', 'updated_value', 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey07', 'iv7') WHERE user_id = 2;
SELECT dt, user_id, tryDecrypt('aes-256-gcm', encrypted, 'wrongkey', iv) AS failed_decryption FROM test_decrypt WHERE user_id = 1;
